sceneAudits.biggestGap: Several recall beats still translated the family wound from above instead of trusting title, vellum, wax, and posture.

place: working camp under Stratholme's horizon stain
material: formal title landing through face and timing
dialogue: recall refusal pinned to vellum and camp hearing distance

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The stone-call lane drifted toward conceptual approval and labeled emotion instead of staying with posture, pulse-light, and visible drop in the body.

place: first birches beyond the fire line
material: dead crystal pocketed against her ribs
dialogue: call readable only through light, wind, and posture
exit: Vereesa's reaction rendered through mouth and shoulders, not summary

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The launch and close each had one abstract line that risked stepping away from lane order, salt, and bodily cost.

place: coast threshold ahead of the harbors
material: stamped earth and cold fire patch
dialogue: Jaina's assent tied to an empty hand and immediate motion
exit: chapter closes on forward movement into wind and failing relays

risksFound: closing approval beat drifting above the road
fixesApplied: Replaced the camp disappearance line with stamped earth, crushed grass, and cold fire residue.
Replaced the closing approval with salt, colder wind, and Sylvanas physically driving the mare north.
